scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @dispatch-simulator/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @dispatch-simulator/server build && corepack pnpm --filter @dispatch-simulator/web build
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @dispatch-simulator/shared test && corepack pnpm --filter @dispatch-simulator/server test && corepack pnpm --filter @dispatch-simulator/web test
